headline: Why Citigroup Inc. (C) is One of the Best Cheap Stocks for Beginners to Invest in
summary: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) is one of the best cheap stocks for beginners to invest in. RBC Capital lifted the price target on Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) to $139 from $121 on April 15, reiterating an Outperform rating on the shares. The rating update came after the company’s fiscal Q1 earnings beat, with the firm telling investors […]
